title: Annotation schema types and helpers for document metadata
purpose: Defines the structure and validation logic for annotations stored in document metadata, including ID generation and type checking utilities.
module_context: Exports annotation type definitions, metadata structure, schema version constant, and utility functions for creating IDs and validating annotation objects.

steps.content: Attempt to generate a random UUID using the browser's crypto API.
IF UUID generation fails or is not available, fall back to generating a random string using Math.random.
Validate that the input is an object and not null.
Check that the object has a valid string ID property.
Verify that the kind property is one of the allowed annotation types.
Confirm that the anchor property exists and is an object with required numeric from/to properties and string text/checksum properties.
Ensure the body property is a string.
Validate that the createdAt property is a number.
Return true if all validation checks pass, otherwise return false.
